name: Plot
goal: Standard-tier multi-series chart covering line, area, and bar geometries in a single component — pure SVG, no external dependencies, sub-8KB target. Hover crosshair + tooltip + legend click-to-toggle + data-layer fade animation.
description: Single SVG chart selectable via the `type` attribute (line / area / bar). Accepts a JSON-attribute or property-bound array of `{ name, color?, points: [{ x, y, label? }], hidden? }` series. The x axis auto-detects scale kind from the first point: Date → time, number → linear, string → category. Y axis is linear and uses the shared niceTicks helper for human-readable ticks. Series colors cycle through the shared default palette unless a series declares `color`, which routes through resolveColor() so both named tokens ("blue", "green", …) and arbitrary CSS colors ("#5a8", "var(--brand)") are accepted. Vertical bars (the default) support grouped layout and `stacked` mode against a category x scale; horizontal bars swap the axes for category-y / value-x. Hover the chart for a vertical crosshair plus a tooltip card listing every visible series at the snapped x; click a per-series marker to dispatch `ce-chart-select`. Click a legend chip to toggle that series' visibility (`ce-chart-toggle`); the component owns the local hidden state separately from `series.hidden`. The data layer fades in on each render when `animated`; `prefers-reduced-motion` always disables motion regardless of the flag.
limitations: Bar charts require a category x scale: `type=bar` with linear or time x renders an in-svg fallback notice rather than misleading geometry. Stacked mode is supported for `type=bar` only (vertical orientation, category x). Stacked area is deferred. Negative-value stacking treats positives and negatives independently from the zero baseline. Hover crosshair + click-to-select are wired for `type=line | area` only; bars rely on their own geometry for hit-testing and emit no marker events in this version. The fade-in animation is a single keyframe on the data layer rather than a per-attribute path tween — sufficient for a noticeable transition without a virtual-DOM tween engine.

props.name: type
props.description: Chart geometry. Reflected to attribute so :host([type=…]) styling is available.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of { name, color?, points, hidden? }. points are { x, y, label? }; x can be a string (category), number (linear), or Date (time).

props.name: xLabel
props.description: Optional label rendered below the x axis.

props.name: yLabel
props.description: Optional label rendered rotated 90° to the left of the y axis.

props.name: legend
props.description: Renders a horizontal legend strip above the SVG with one chip per series. Click-to-toggle lands in phase 8.

props.name: gridlines
props.description: Which axis (or both) carries gridlines behind the data.

props.name: tooltip
props.description: Reserved for the phase-8 hover crosshair + tooltip card. Currently unused.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Only meaningful for `type=bar`. Horizontal orientation swaps the axes (category on y, value on x).

props.name: stacked
props.description: Stack multi-series bars against a category x scale instead of grouping them side-by-side.

props.name: animated
props.description: Reserved for the phase-8 path / bar tween on data change. Property is `animated` (not `animate`) to avoid colliding with HTMLElement.animate(); attribute is also `animated`. prefers-reduced-motion always disables motion regardless of this flag.

props.name: width
props.description: CSS width applied to the host via --ce-plot-width.

props.name: height
props.description: CSS height applied to the host via --ce-plot-height.

props.name: format
props.description: Number formatter for axis tick labels; defaults to the shared locale-aware number() helper.

props.name: emptyText
props.description: Text rendered when the data array is empty or every series is hidden / pointless.

events.name: ce-chart-hover
events.detail: PointHoverDetail<PlotPoint, PlotSeries>: { kind: "point", x, points: [{ series, point }] }
events.description: Pointer moved over the chart area; payload carries the snapped raw x and the per-series points that line up with that x.

events.name: ce-chart-leave
events.description: Pointer left the chart area or the snapped position became invalid. Empty payload.

events.name: ce-chart-select
events.detail: PointSelectDetail<PlotPoint, PlotSeries>: { series, point, type, originalEvent }
events.description: User clicked a per-series marker. Line / area only — bars do not currently emit select.

events.name: ce-chart-toggle
events.description: User clicked a legend chip. Payload reports the desired hidden state for that series. Series visibility is owned locally; consumers can listen to mirror state.

cssVariables.name: --ce-plot-width
cssVariables.description: Host width; set inline from the width prop.

cssVariables.name: --ce-plot-height
cssVariables.description: Host height; set inline from the height prop.

cssVariables.name: --ce-plot-line-w
cssVariables.description: Stroke width for line / area outlines (SVG units).

cssVariables.name: --ce-plot-bar-radius
cssVariables.description: (Reserved.) Bar corner radius. Currently the SVG `rx` attribute is hardcoded to 2 because SVG geometric attributes do not accept CSS custom properties. Future work: route through a Lit @property bound at render time so consumers can override.

cssVariables.name: --ce-plot-grid
cssVariables.description: Gridline stroke color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-plot-axis
cssVariables.description: Axis line stroke color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-plot-tick-fg
cssVariables.description: Tick-label and (default) axis-label fill color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-plot-area-opacity
cssVariables.description: Opacity multiplier for the filled area path beneath area-chart strokes.

cssVariables.name: --ce-plot-fade
cssVariables.description: Transition timing for the data-layer fade-in, marker radius, tooltip opacity, and legend chip background; replaced with 0s under prefers-reduced-motion.

cssVariables.name: --ce-plot-tooltip-bg
cssVariables.description: Background color of the hover tooltip card. Defaults to --ce-surface so theming the host theme also themes the tooltip.

cssVariables.name: --ce-plot-tooltip-fg
cssVariables.description: Foreground (text) color of the hover tooltip card.

cssVariables.name: --ce-plot-tooltip-border
cssVariables.description: Border color of the hover tooltip card.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-1
cssVariables.description: Legend chip swatch gap.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Legend chip horizontal padding + bottom margin under the legend strip.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Legend chip-to-chip gap.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text
cssVariables.description: Legend chip text color and y-axis-label color when set.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Empty-state and default tick-label color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-xs
cssVariables.description: Tick-label and legend-chip font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-sm
cssVariables.description: Empty-state and axis-label font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-surface-2
cssVariables.description: Legend chip background.

cssVariables.name: --ce-border
cssVariables.description: Legend chip border.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue
cssVariables.description: Default series color (resolved via paletteColor → resolveColor).

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition
cssVariables.description: Transition timing function used for the phase-8 fade.

globalDependencies.purpose: Locale-aware default number formatter (via shared internal/charts/format.ts).
Detect prefers-reduced-motion to gate the phase-8 fade transition (via shared internal/charts/easing.ts).
Time-scale x ticks via Date.toISOString() when a series uses Date-typed x values.

a11y.notes: The SVG carries role=img and a generated aria-label summarising series count, names, and y-range. The legend is a role=list ul of role=listitem li > <button aria-pressed> chips with visible focus rings — keyboard users can tab to a chip and toggle via Enter/Space (native button behavior). The hover crosshair + tooltip card are aria-hidden; the chart's overall semantics are conveyed through the role=img label rather than through live updates. prefers-reduced-motion disables both the data-layer fade-in animation and the crosshair / tooltip transitions via @media inside the component styles.
